reviews.review_description: (kids that one to be a pilot one day read before play) okay you know how in real life there are so many controls and vtol vr have all of the controls and guess what this game doesn’t even have this button in front of you all it have is a throttle a stick and a button to fire missile not multiple button to fire them in real life even the trees on the map are littler defying gravity by 3 meter something like that so I don’t recommed playing this one play the ww1 warplanes that better AIGHT

reviews.review_title: Well Made and Really Fun Game!
reviews.review_description:
I absolutely love this game. It’s easy to learn, took a little while to master but is so enjoyable. The movement physics match real life and don’t get me nauseous like other flight games. Missions are all a tiny bit different and it makes each one feel new to me. Improvements are needed and I’ll list them. 
1: update the aircraft. Your title screen shows an AH64 Apache silhouette but it’s not in game. Give us an F22 also. 
2: build a bombing architecture. You could easily add a TTP screen to the map monitor that would let you laser guide bombs to target. Could make it exclusive to the A10 and F16. 
3: Restructuring your multiplayer function would be a HUGE bonus. It took a friend and I 30 minutes to get a coop mission started. 
4 Make a disabled aircraft condition in PVP and an eject function (with animation) in order to respawn

Im honest, first I was a little bit disappointed of Air Corp. It's not as polished as Warplanes WW1 and Pacific. The graphics could be much better for Quest 3 but it still makes fun to play and the tutorials help a lot to learn the helicopter/plane controls, well done! I really hope it will still get future updates and is not abandoned by the devs. An Airwolf helicopter would be cool with all the interiors, just name it Airsheep in case there is some copyright problems - LOL

I'm an IRL civilian pilot. While this game can be fun, don't expect DCS level accuracy or Ace Combat level fun if you decide to purchase. The controls feel jank, the enemy AI isn't smart, and the levels seem uninspired.

reviews.review_title: I love your games!! *Devs please read*
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing! I haven't played the headset in a while and decoded to pick it up and look and see what's new. I'm glad i did because I've got all the warplanes and love them so much! It took a minute to figure out how to lock on. And it's really difficult to hit something with bullets. There's room for improvement. I'm sure it's difficult with modern aircraft. There's alot of limits on the quest 2. I can't wait to see what yall do with the quest 3! And idk what it is. *There's a bug. I maybe moving my head too much or something idk but the camera view puts me about one foot to the side and backwards. So I'm outside my craft and lose control and go straight to the ground. It makes me fail missions lol I tried finding where to tell yall there's a bug but couldn't. I'll update once you see this *

The game is pretty solid but as a person who has always wanted an option to turn the voice acting off in these games the AI voice acting in this game is such a pain in the (Behind). Atleast the other games had a bit charming voice acting, especially the first one but the voice acting in this one is just souless. At worst the other games voice acting could get a bit annoying but in this game it at BEST gets VERY annoying. If they just made it so you could turn the voices off
the game would be 10 times better. Except for that, the game is actually pretty good.

developer_response.body: In the settings you will find sliders to control the volume, including dialogues.

reviews.review_description:
Give an option to turn off auto flares permanently, I've had 15 wasted on one missile before because I forgot to turn them off at the beginning of every single mission; that button could be better utilized for the landing gear.
Spawning locations for the jets are egregious. I guess my pilot sat with his hands in his lap until her was in the middle of an anti-aircraft zone. And you might have to try multiple times to grab the stick and throttle even after holding them leaving the airstrip. I'm already holding the grip key, just keep the control active. 
The jets are very fun, but the missions are often built around the anti aircraft systems that cut virtually all of the fun out of flying. The helicopters are well designed and have a high learning curve, I just don't enjoy being forced to use them.

It was horrible I could not even refund it and it’s kind of decent but at the same time you need to add more planes and be able to drop bombs and nukes and stuff like that and when you look at the description or what it’s showing, it is not that it all it is a scam. Do not buy it. I need a refund.

developer_response.body:
Make sure you have an account on our Cloud Save and contact our support team via:
https://www.homenetgames.com/support/
providing your account details. We will be happy to add in-game credits to your account.

Apart from that, please make sure to check out the in-game tips and tutorials, including:
a) The "Basic Flight" section in the Tutorial, on the right monitor at the base, will help you learn how to navigate the helicopter. 
b) It is also worth taking a look at the Flight Setup settings, available at the bottom of the central monitor, a moment before starting the mission - there you can change the flight model to one closer to simulation, or a simplified one (Arcade), and modify the sensitivity of your machine. 
c) It may also be helpful to visit the "Controls" section (left monitor at the base), where you can choose the Controls Layout that is convenient for you.
d) As well as this, a somewhat additional document with useful gameplay tips: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1wpigWtNmZN4i7IZwLsCXiYIox0bK9IYbN7xjGBR9Jac/edit

Definitely worth getting if you enjoy flying.

reviews.review_description: UPDATES 🙏

To be honest this game is fun when you are playing with or against friends. Also the game has really easy to learn controls with out right mechanics.

   Everything good stops there. Plane models need to be fixed. Especially the F-45 model the cockpit is WAY too wide and is just unrealistic. Also the weapons in this game are all the same which makes it boring. If more weapons were added along with different gun sounds, fire rate, and different millimeter bullets. Then it would do a lot.

    Community has been saying this for a while but we need more planes especially the F-18 to rival the mig in game. PLEASE get rid of the map system that shows you exactly where a player is near you. Instead swap it out with a radar system. If you aren’t going to get rid of the map system then just add a RWR that will tell you when launched and where they are instead of have a unrealistic beep sound that tells your being shot at. 

    One last thing more variety in the planes the only difference between the a-10 and the F45 in this game is 1. speed and 2. vtol ability. Every other plane in the game is basically the same speed, turn rate, and climb rate. Thank you for your time

The app is fantastic but the landscape needs to be upgraded …additional scenery’s would definitely improve the play…also expland the flying borders.. additional planes…F22, F15, F14,F18…one last thing a free flight mode where you just fly the globe and at each planes max height …

The Good

The game’s visuals are decent, with detailed plane models and vibrant environments. Explosions and missile effects look flashy, and the controls are easy to pick up, making it accessible to newcomers.

The Bad

Unfortunately, the praise stops there. The game’s most glaring flaw is the lack of variety and realism. Every plane in the game, despite looking different, handles and performs identically. If u r piloting a fighter jet, the turn rate, speed, missile loadout, and guns are all the same. This not only kills immersion but also strips away any strategic depth.

The weaponry is equally uninspired. All planes are equipped with the same generic missiles and machine guns. There’s no customization, no unique advantages or trade-offs, and no reason to pick one plane over another besides aesthetics. This lazy approach to gameplay design feels like a slap in the face to fans of air combat who expect planes to have distinct characteristics based on their real-life counterparts.

Final Thoughts

Warplanes ahave been an engaginge air combat experience, but its lazy design makes it a chore to play. The lack of plane variety, identical weaponry, and absence of realism turn what could have been an immersive game into a shallow disappointment. It’s a missed opportunity that will leave fans of the genre unimpressed.

reviews.review_title: Jet not activating when clicking on it

developer_response.body:
To start the Training Mission - for example, the one covering Basic Flight - you can follow these steps:
    - Select the right-side monitor and choose "TRAINING MISSIONS".
    - On the right, in the Basic Flight section, click the button with the Fighter icon.
    - Head to the left monitor and pick a plane from your collection (such as the AA-37c). This is a solid choice for this mission.
    - On the middle monitor, click "Change Status." This will switch your AA-37c from "Active – Support Aircraft" to "Active – Commander Aircraft," meaning you’ll be piloting it yourself when the mission starts.
    - Finally, verify your mission setup on the middle monitor summary. At the top, make sure it says "Aircraft: Fighter." Once everything looks good, press the "START!" button to begin your training mission from the Fighter’s perspective.

We hope this clears things up and helps you take off smoothly. In case of any further difficulties, please contact our support using:
https://www.homenetgames.com/support/

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestion. At this moment - when your machine's HP drops drastically, remember that you can use one of the other machines you took on a mission as part of your Squadron and "switch between your machines" while in air. Please check the TEAM button in the cockpit, where you will be able to switch between your machines and avoid impending disaster this way.

reviews.review_title: The franchise takes on a era
reviews.review_description: I’ve been a fan of the series and this game has just become my top play. I love that you are now able to take on the role of a chopper pilot as well as the plane/jet pilot. Training for vehicle feels competent. Controls are easy to learn and takes time to master, this is especially true with the jets. If you’re prone to motion sickness you may want to stick with the chopper.

reviews.review_title: Awesome! And the Devs fix bugs quick!
reviews.review_description: So fun, lots of planes and helicopters to choose. The sound design is also a little off but can't complain too much. The plane design is good. Missions have some variation but not a whole lot but that's no issue yet after several hours. THE DEVS LISTEN. There was a crash bug and they fixed it quickly. The new update works great and I've had no issues after 8 missions. Love the game and a ton of fun. Thanks for making such a fun game and supporting it. Absolute 5 star deserved.

I love this game and play it everyday. I have the WWI and WWII games as well. I do wish there were more available aircraft. The problem I am having lately is it freezing up when I am almost finished with the mission. I searched online for possible fixes and I deleted all the apps I could get rid of. That worked for a short time but it is doing 3-4 times in an 1.5 hour game session. Tighter turns would be appreciated as well. The only noticeable difference in performance is helicopter vs fixed wing jets. Yes, the F-16 and F-35 go faster than the A-10, but they all handle about the same. 

     All that being said, it is super fun to play!! I play it exclusively these days. Would really like an F-15 E with the ability to drop dumb bombs like in Battles over the Pacific.
I wanna play with my dad but Naurp bc he just wants to fly around at 40,000 feet instead of shooting so add a free roam map that’s bigger
Hands down best flight sim for military combat
I like the graphics’s but I can barely pull up and no ejection

developer_response.body:
Using the advantage that your own Squadron gives you is essentially the equivalent of instant evacuation, allowing you to dynamically switch to other machines in the middle of a mission.

On the topic of controls, please check the "Basic Flight" section in the Tutorial, on the right monitor at the base, it will help you learn how to fly. 

It is also worth taking a look at the Flight Setup settings, available at the bottom of the central monitor, a moment before starting the mission - there you can change the flight model to one closer to simulation, or a simplified one (Arcade), and modify the sensitivity of your machine. 

It may also be helpful to visit the "Controls" section (left monitor at the base), where you can choose the Controls Layout that is convenient for you.

Give yourself a chance and take a few minutes to practice, and you'll turn into an excellent pilot in no time!
